testcase.name: beforeTest

error.message:
Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Cannot start the 'com.android.calculator2' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\ksman\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start-activity -W -n com.android.calculator2/com.android.calculator2.Calculator -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' exited with code 1'; Command output: Stopping: com.android.calculator2 Starting: Intent { act=android.intent.action.MAIN cat=[android.intent.category.LAUNCHER] flg=0x10200000 cmp=com.android.calculator2/.Calculator } Error type 3 Error: Activity class {com.android.calculator2/com.android.calculator2.Calculator} does not exist.
Host info: host: 'ASUSTUFF15', ip: '192.168.1.97' Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:appActivity: com.android.calculator2.Cal..., appium:appPackage: com.android.calculator2, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: emulator-5554, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:noReset: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: true, appium:udid: emulator-5554, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout: 120000, platformName: ANDROID}, capabilities=[{platformName=ANDROID, appium:appActivity=com.android.calculator2.Calculator, appium:autoGrantPermissions=true, appium:appPackage=com.android.calculator2, appium:skipDeviceInitialization=true, appium:automationName=UiAutomator2, appium:udid=emulator-5554, appium:adbExecTimeout=120000, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError=true, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout=120000, appium:noReset=true, appium:deviceName=emulator-5554}]}] Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:appActivity: com.android.calculator2.Cal..., appium:appPackage: com.android.calculator2, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: emulator-5554, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:noReset: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: true, appium:udid: emulator-5554, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout: 120000, platformName: ANDROID}

testcase.error:
org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Cannot start the 'com.android.calculator2' application. Consider checking the driver's troubleshooting documentation. Original error: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\ksman\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell am start-activity -W -n com.android.calculator2/com.android.calculator2.Calculator -S -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER -f 0x10200000' exited with code 1'; Command output: Stopping: com.android.calculator2 Starting: Intent { act=android.intent.action.MAIN cat=[android.intent.category.LAUNCHER] flg=0x10200000 cmp=com.android.calculator2/.Calculator } Error type 3 Error: Activity class {com.android.calculator2/com.android.calculator2.Calculator} does not exist.
Host info: host: 'ASUSTUFF15', ip: '192.168.1.97' Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:appActivity: com.android.calculator2.Cal..., appium:appPackage: com.android.calculator2, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: emulator-5554, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:noReset: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: true, appium:udid: emulator-5554, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout: 120000, platformName: ANDROID}, capabilities=[{platformName=ANDROID, appium:appActivity=com.android.calculator2.Calculator, appium:autoGrantPermissions=true, appium:appPackage=com.android.calculator2, appium:skipDeviceInitialization=true, appium:automationName=UiAutomator2, appium:udid=emulator-5554, appium:adbExecTimeout=120000, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError=true, appium:uiautomator2ServerLaunchTimeout=120000, appium:noReset=true, appium:deviceName=emulator-5554}]}] Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:appActivity: com.android.calculator2.Cal..., appium:appPackage: com.android.calculator2, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:deviceName: emulator-5554, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true,
